attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.LINE_SEQ_ID, 
XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.ORDER_NUMBER, 
XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.ROUTE_CODE, 
XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.SHIPSET_NUMBER, 
XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.SHIP_TO, 
XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.SHIP_FROM, 
XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.HEADER_ID, 
XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.LINE_ID, 
XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.SHIP_DATE, 
XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, 
XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.ITEM_NAME, 
XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.OCC_COUNTRY_CODE,
 XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.DSLC_COUNTRY_CODE, 
 XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.STATUS, 
 XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.IOR, 
 XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.ORIG_SYS_DOCUMENT_REF, 
 CASE WHEN INSTR(ORIG_SYS_LINE_REF ,'QTC')>0 THEN 'QTC'
WHEN INSTR(ORIG_SYS_LINE_REF ,'BV') >0THEN 'BV' 
WHEN INSTR(ORIG_SYS_LINE_REF ,'CG') >0THEN 'CG' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END, 
 XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.CREATED_BY, 
 XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.CREATION_DATE, 
 XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
 XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, 
 XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.ATTRIBUTE1, 
 XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.ATTRIBUTE2,
 XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.ATTRIBUTE3,
 XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.ATTRIBUTE4,
 XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.ATTRIBUTE5,
 XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.ORG_ID, 
 XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.SCHEDULE_SHIP_DATE,
 XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.SCHEDULE_ARRIVAL_DATE, 
 XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.ITEM_DESCRIPTION, 
 XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.LEG_0_FLAG, 
 XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.LEG_0_HTS_CHECK, 
 XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.LEG_0_NAME,
 XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.LEG_0_EXPORT_COUNTRY,
 XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.LEG_0_IMPORT_COUNTRY,
 XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.LEG_1_FLAG, 
 XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.LEG_1_HTS_CHECK, 
 XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.LEG_1_NAME, 
 XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.LEG_1_EXPORT_COUNTRY, 
 XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.LEG_1_IMPORT_COUNTRY, 
 XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.LEG_2_FLAG,
 XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.LEG_2_HTS_CHECK,
 XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.LEG_2_NAME, 
XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.LEG_2_EXPORT_COUNTRY, 
XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.LEG_2_IMPORT_COUNTRY,
 XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.PICK_RELEASE_POINT, 
 XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.LEG_0_PICK_RELEASE, 
 XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.LEG_1_PICK_RELEASE, 
 XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.LEG_2_PICK_RELEASE, 
 XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.IOR_TYPE 
FROM
 XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS WHERE
  XXCFI_CB_CG1_ORDER_LINE_DTLS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE > TO_DATE('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
